﻿.. _dp-AssignableButton2:

CrDeviceProperty_AssignableButton2
==================================

Get/Set the Assignable Button 2

    CrDataType: `CrDataType_UInt16Array`

.. list-table::

  :header-rows: 1

  * - Parameter Code
    - Explanation

  * - CrAssignableButton_Up

  * - CrAssignableButton_Down
